race.comment: JENNI POPPINS (8) is knocking on the door and can break through here. She's just found one better in three runs this time in, no match for a dominant winner last time at Sale but battling on well. Up to 1600m should suit perfectly and she'll be very hard to hold out. WOLFOFFITROYSTREET (5) was firmly in the market fresh at Ballarat and battled home for fourth on heavy ground. He can strip fitter and up in trip will suit better, go close. BANK HEIST (1) is racing well and comes back in trip which could suit better. MISSION TAICHI (3) is a Tivaci gelding for the Payne yard who can run well after a recent fourth in a Burrumbeet jump-out.
